# dist-telemetry/ — built awow-telemetry plugin payload

This directory is the installable `awow-telemetry` Claude Code plugin, built by `python tools/gather.py --surface telemetry` from the `channel: telemetry` skills under `.agents/skills/` plus a runtime slice of `tools/`. The repo-root `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` points installers here as the second entry, so `/plugin install awow-telemetry@awow` resolves.

**Claude Code only this release.** `tools/sync-dist.sh` mirrors only `dist/` into `awow-dist`, which is the Codex and Pi install source — so nothing here reaches those harnesses. That is the intended scope, not an omission.

Do not edit files in this directory — edit the source and re-run the gather. Any file here that the build did not plan is deleted on the next run.
